11.description: Added doc = false to [[bin]] in motif_debug_cli/Cargo.toml. Issue #11 closed by maintainer (completed).

12.description: Added .github/workflows/release.yml (validate->draft-release->publish pipeline) and extended scripts/release.sh with bump <version> subcommand. Push failed — issue #23 created with patch artifact. Maintainer can apply manually from run 22656017116 artifacts.

workspace_deps.description: Populated [workspace.dependencies] with shared external + internal crates; all 5 workspace members migrated to workspace = true; motif_test migrated to workspace package metadata.

contributing_docs.description: Added CONTRIBUTING.md with prerequisites, project layout, building, testing (TDD philosophy), code style, debug CLI, spool, and PR submission guide.

checkbox_element.description: Implemented Checkbox element in motif_core/src/elements/checkbox.rs with builder API, hit testing, checked/unchecked quads, hover/press visual state, and 9 unit tests. Resolves p3 TODO 'Checkbox element' from spool elements stream.

text_input_element.description: Implemented TextInput element in motif_core/src/elements/text_input.rs with builder API, placeholder, focused/unfocused border, cursor rendering, UTF-8 cursor snapping, and 10 unit tests. Resolves p2 TODO 'Text input element' from spool elements stream.

todomvc_example.description: Implemented TodoMVC example. Now superseded by maintainer's PR #35 (merged). PR #20 should be closed.

element_list_debug.description: Added element.list debug command: flat HitTree dump (id, bounds, z_index). Adds update_hit_tree() to DebugServer, HitEntryInfo to snapshot.rs, CLI formatter. Stepping stone toward 'Query element tree (p1)' devtools TODO.

hot_render_boundary.description: Added motif::hot module with RenderFn type alias, hot::call(), and hot::connect(). Documents stable boundary contract (what is safe to change between hot patches). Updates hot.rs example to use new API. Resolves p1 spool task 'Design hot-reloadable render function boundary'.

metal_alignment_docs.description: Added module-level doc comment to metal/mod.rs explaining the float3 16-byte alignment gotcha, improved _padding field docs, and compile-time const assertions. Resolves p3 spool task 'Document Metal struct alignment gotcha'.

keyboard_simulation.description: Added key_down/key_up/key_press functions to input_sim.rs using macOS CGEvent keyboard API + non-macOS stubs. 18 new tests. Resolves p2 spool task 'Simulate keyboard events'.

inject_debug_text.description: Added OverlayText struct; debug.draw_text server method; draw.text CLI command; 10 new integration tests. Resolves p2 spool task 'Inject debug text'.

multi_click_detection.description: Extended InputState.end_press() with consecutive-click tracking. click_count() accessor returns 1=single, 2=double, 3=triple. 8 unit tests. Resolves p1 spool task 'Double-click detection in InputState'.

screenshot_diff.description: Added DiffResult struct; diff_screenshots(path_a, path_b, output_path, threshold) using existing image crate; screenshot.diff server command; parse_screenshot_diff CLI parser; format_screenshot_diff formatter; 8 unit tests. Resolves p2 spool task 'Screenshot diffing utility' (mlr44ma9-70y8). Build fails on Linux due to fontconfig (known infrastructure issue).

dep_audit.notes: Ran cargo metadata on Linux. All 5 workspace packages resolve correctly. [workspace.dependencies] is empty (PR #16 addresses). Individual crates use reasonable semver pins. Could not run cargo outdated (macOS required for full Metal build). Feature branches (feature/devtools, feature/focus-system, feature/hot-reload, feature/input-system, feature/quad-borders) exist on GitHub but predate current main.

devtools_investigation.findings: scene.quads, scene.text_runs, input.state, debug.draw_quad, debug.clear, screenshot all already implemented in server.rs. 'Query element tree (p1)' TODO is NOT fully implemented. PR #21 adds element.list (flat HitTree dump: id, bounds, z_index). Full element tree query still needs: parent-child tracking in DrawContext, component type names in HitEntry.

2026-03-04.notes: CI requires macOS for clippy/test. fmt and doc run on ubuntu-latest. No CI runs found for any Repo Assist draft PR branches. This may be because draft PRs from github-actions bot do not trigger workflows. All PRs show build failure on Linux due to missing fontconfig — same infrastructure issue. Will nudge open PRs on 2026-03-18 if not reviewed.

focus_module_findings.findings: focus.rs already has FocusId (atomic counter), FocusHandle (Arc-based), FocusEvent (Focus/Blur), FocusState (tracks current focus + pending events) with comprehensive tests. accessibility.rs has FocusManager (tab order navigation). What is missing: (1) DrawContext integration so elements can call ctx.focus_handle() to claim focus, (2) InputState routing keyboard events to focused element. Good multi-file change after #18/#19 merge.

notes: Run 15 (22676882020): Task 10 — implemented screenshot diffing utility (branch repo-assist/improve-screenshot-diff). DiffResult struct; diff_screenshots() with threshold and optional diff image output; screenshot.diff server command; CLI command parse_screenshot_diff + format_screenshot_diff; 8 unit tests. Resolves p2 spool task 'Screenshot diffing utility' (mlr44ma9-70y8). Build fails on Linux due to missing fontconfig (same infrastructure issue as all prior PRs). Task 11 — updated Monthly Activity Summary. Next priorities: (a) On 2026-03-18 nudge PRs #21/#22/#25/#27/#36 if not reviewed. (b) Focus management integration into DrawContext (good for after #18/#19 merge). (c) Visual regression test harness (p3) — builds on screenshot diff. (d) element.inspect <id> after #21 merges. (e) Per-item inline text editing (p1 todomvc) after #36 merges.
